rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and resolves an internal contradiction, proposes minimal repairs, and walks the chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, marks confidence, and highlights missing evidence or assumptions.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope violations.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., internal contradiction).
